META.reasoning: TREND: Daily EMA alignment technically shows 10 EMA (656) > 21 EMA (647) > 50 EMA (639), but this is a lagging artifact — current price at 611.91 has broken decisively below ALL EMAs (5/10/21/50/200), trading -5.39% below 21 EMA and -4.23% below 50 EMA. This is not a pullback to EMA; it is a confirmed breakdown through the entire EMA stack. ADX at 49.21 is strong, but minus_DI (34.51) exceeds plus_DI (26.27), confirming the dominant trend force is now bearish sellers, not buyers. Hourly EMAs are not aligned in either direction, and price is below all hourly EMAs as well — no multi-timeframe confirmation of an uptrend. MOMENTUM: Deeply negative and decelerating. ROC 5d: -7.17%, ROC 10d: -9.60% — both sharply negative. ROC 21d is still +6.95% but is being rapidly dragged down. MACD histogram on daily: -2.16 (negative). Hourly MACD histogram: -8.46 (deeply negative, momentum accelerating to the downside). RSI 7 at 23.55 and hourly RSI 21 at 24.16 signal extreme short-term oversold conditions, but oversold does not equal bullish trend+momentum setup. Volume on the breakdown day (52.67M vs 20D avg 15.78M, 3.34x relative volume) confirms institutional distribution. WIKI CONTEXT: Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 29 AH) triggered a ~10% single-session collapse from $669 to ~$601-603 on 9.99x relative hourly volume — institutional distribution confirmed. The prior April 15-17 breakout thesis at $675-677 is fully invalidated. Wiki flags next actionable entry only on a dead-cat bounce into $618-630 resistance before considering a short. Current price (~$611-613) is just below that resistance band, which reinforces caution rather than bullishness. LESSONS: Recent EMA pullback/Fib dip-buy trade on NVDA lost -$264.65 (0% win rate in last 30 days on this setup type); swing_trend_momentum was bullish in that losing trade under similar conditions (price below EMAs, oversold RSI, AI thesis intact) — lowering confidence in any bullish entry here. CONCLUSION: Strategy requires both trend AND momentum ACCELERATING. Neither condition is met for a bullish setup. The breakdown is post-earnings institutional selling with no trend+momentum confirmation. The oversold readings may attract a bounce, but a bounce into $618-630 would be resistance, not a clean EMA pullback entry in an intact uptrend. Outputting neutral per strategy rules: no entry when momentum is decelerating and price is below all EMAs.
META.timeframe: wait — no setup active; re-evaluate if price reclaims 21 EMA (~647) with expanding ROC and MACD histogram turning positive
